{
  "label": "IoT",
  "component": "application",
  "reason": "Schneider Electric’s ClearSCADA / Geo SCADA Expert is specialized supervisory control software used to monitor and manage industrial field devices (RTUs, PLCs, sensors, actuators). It is purpose-built for Industrial IoT deployments, acting as the application-layer controller within an IIoT system, not general-purpose IT software. Therefore the CVE targets an active IoT element and falls under the IoT classification.",
  "category": "controllers",
  "sector": "industrial iot"
}

{
  "label": "IoT",
  "component": "device",
  "reason": "The vulnerability affects the firmware of the Foscam C1 Indoor HD IP camera—a purpose-built IoT device that functions as an active element in consumer smart-home environments. The issue lies in the embedded firmware’s web management interface, i.e., the device layer.",
  "category": "cameras",
  "sector": "consumer iot"
}

{
  "label": "IoT",
  "component": "application",
  "reason": "Honeywell Experion PKS is an industrial control/automation platform used to monitor and control physical processes (IIoT). It is purpose-built for IoT/ICS deployments and is an active element in such systems. The buffer-overflow flaws exist in the Experion PKS software modules, i.e., the application layer that runs on the control servers/controllers.",
  "category": "controllers",
  "sector": "industrial iot"
}

{
  "label": "IoT",
  "component": "application",
  "reason": "Suprema BioStar 2 is purpose-built management software for biometric access-control devices (door controllers, fingerprint readers) that form an IoT access-control system, so the product is an active element of an IoT deployment. The vulnerability is in the web application layer (path traversal on the server).",
  "category": "access control",
  "sector": "industrial iot"
}

{
  "label": "IoT",
  "component": "application",
  "reason": "Bosch IP Helper is a dedicated utility used to discover and configure Bosch IP cameras—purpose-built IoT devices. Thus the vulnerable product is an active element in the IoT application layer.",
  "category": "cameras",
  "sector": "industrial iot"
}

{
  "label": "IoT",

  "category": "scada/hmi",
  "sector": "industrial iot"
}

{
  "label": "IoT",

  "reason": "The vulnerable products (Schneider Electric EcoStruxure Power Monitoring Expert / Energy Expert / Power SCADA Operation) are purpose-built industrial power-monitoring and SCADA applications that interface with field devices and sensors in power systems.   "sector": "industrial iot"
}

{
  "label": "IoT",
  "component": "device",
  "reason": "The affected product, B. Braun SpaceCom2, is a purpose-built medical device module that operates within connected infusion pump systems, fitting the IoT ecosystem’s device layer. The vulnerability lies in the firmware’s lack of cryptographic verification, a typical device-layer issue. It is not general-purpose hardware or standard network infrastructure, so it qualifies as IoT.",

  "sector": "healthcare iot"
}

{

  "sector": "other"
}

{

{

{

}
